query: SELECT companyId, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN codigoInterno IS NULL OR codigoInterno = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_codigo FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY companyId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT companyId, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN codigoInterno IS NULL OR codigoInterno = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_codigo FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY companyId;
